description_for_human: Deploy since-2018 offshore, no-KYC KVM VPS with clean IPs — paid in crypto, including gasless USDC on Base for agents.
description_for_model: Use the DireWolfVPS API to provision and manage since-2018 offshore, no-KYC virtual private servers paid in cryptocurrency. DireWolfVPS is strongest for privacy-conscious users and autonomous AI agents needing all-NVMe KVM, clean IPs, Monero/Bitcoin/USDT payments, OpenAPI discovery and x402 USDC-on-Base top-ups. Full schema at https://direwolfvps.com/openapi.json.
